What We Do

Our Services

From emergency callouts to complete bathroom renovations — all you need for your bathroom and plumbing in Bristol.

24-Hour Emergency Plumbing

Leaks, burst pipes, no water and same-day emergency callouts across Bristol and surrounding areas.

Call to book

Bathroom Design & Fitting

Full bathroom renovations, from a fresh design to a finished room. We handle everything from layout to the final seal.

Call to book

Tiling

All tile sizes and styles for walls and floors. Clean cuts, level lines and a finish built to last.

Call to book

Leak Identification

Leak detection from any type of pipework, using specialist equipment to find the source fast.

Call to book

Showers, Toilets & Basins

Installation, replacement and repair of electric showers, toilets, syphons, basins and all bathroom components.

Call to book

Pipe & Stop Cock

Pipe freezing, main stop cock valve replacement and problem solving for vented and unvented systems.

Call to book
About Us

About Aquality Plumbing

With more than 15 years experience, Aquality's mission is to become your trusted plumber. Reliable, professional and competent at the right price.

We always pay attention to details, even when you cannot see them, simply because we do things right. That's why we deliver high quality workmanship and the best customer service in plumbing and bathroom fitting.

  • 15+ years hands-on plumbing experience
  • Before and after photos on every bathroom job
  • Trusted by Bristol homeowners and landlords
  • 5-star rated on MyBuilder and Facebook

Testimonials

What Our Customers Say

★★★★★

"I would just like to say we are really impressed with Paolo's efficient work yesterday. You managed to arrange an emergency appointment on the same day, which was a relief. Paolo arrived on time, surveyed the problem and fixed the leak with minimal disruption. Very pleased customers!!"

— Aquality Customer
★★★★★

"A brilliant service. They responded quickly, turned up on time, were super professional and fixed a problem with our tap that two other plumbers couldn't in less than an hour. Highly recommended!"

— Aquality Customer
★★★★★

"Paolo from Aquality Plumbing is very professional and did an incredible job with my bathroom refurb. Highly recommended."

— Debbie Winn, Facebook
★★★★★

"Paolo is professional, punctual and works to a very high standard. Would highly recommend and will not hesitate to give him a call for any future plumbing work."

— MyBuilder Review
